news.title: OpenAI unveils new image model that’s better at charts and diagrams

news.title: OpenAI in talks to commit up to $1.5 billion to private equity joint venture: FT
news.description: Artificial intelligence firm OpenAI is reportedly planning to invest up to $1.5 billion in a new joint venture, internally named 'DeployCo'. This venture, with private equity firms, is expected to be valued at $10 billion.
